reason: Bitcoin is encountering strong immediate resistance at $70,000, having faded after touching this level. While altcoins are demonstrating significant upward momentum, signaling increased risk appetite and broader market participation, analysts caution that the market may not be entirely out of a volatile period. Bitcoin's ability to snap back near $69,000 suggests underlying demand, but a definitive breach and hold above $70,000 is crucial for confirming sustained bullish conviction. The positive macro sentiment from strong tech earnings (Nvidia) provides an indirect tailwind, yet the immediate struggle at key resistance necessitates careful observation.
headlines: Bitcoin touches $70,000 before fading as altcoins lead the strongest bounce in weeks
Uniswap’s UNI jumps 15% as governance vote to expand fee switch gains momentum
Bitcoin snaps back near $69,000 but analysts warn the market may not be out of the woods yet
Nvidia earnings smashed expectations as the world’s largest company CEO says AI is only getting better
Solo bitcoin miner turns $75 of rented hashrate into a $200,000 block reward
